title: IMMZ.D2.DT.Varicella.2Dose ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZ.D2.DT.Varicella.2Dose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

csailt12m-35.42.en: Client's age is less than 12 months

lvwaitp4w-49.92.en: Live vaccine was administered in the past 4 weeks

nlvwaitp4w-52.92.en: No live vaccine was administered in the past 4 weeks

csaimtoet12m-46.42.en: Cient's age is more than or equal to 12 months

nvpsdwa-51.129.en: No varicella primary series doses were administered

ovpsdwa-50.128.en: One varicella primary series dose was administered

tlvdalt4wa-60.112.en: The latest varicella dose administered less than 4 weeks ago

tlvdamt4wa-60.112.en: The latest varicella dose administered more than 4 weeks ago

tvpsdwa-52.129.en: Two varicella primary series doses were administered

cindfvv-43.48.en: Client is not due for varicella vaccination

cidfvv-39.44.en: Client is due for varicella vaccination
